title: Square's Addons
description: Adds more fun things Like new ores, Tools, Structures and biomes as well as Building Blocks like Concrete Stairs & Slabs
body:
**WARNING THIS MOD COULD HAVE BUGS**

1. **Items & Blocks**:
   
i. **Shardstone Ore**: This is a pink/purple Ore, when mined they drop Shardstone Ingot. If the Ore is smelted it gives a Shardstone Gem

ii. **Shardstone Ingot**: You can Obtain these Ingots from mining Shardstone Ore, find it In the End Towers, turning 9 Shardstone Gems into an Ingot or turning 1 Block of Shardstone into 9 Ingots. They can be used to make tools

iii. **Shardstone Gems**: Shardstone Gems are basically the Nugget form of the Shardstone Ingot. You can obtain this by SMELTING a Shardstone Ore or Crafting a Shardstone Ingot into the Gems

iv. **The Block of Shardstone**: The Block of Shardstone is basically the Block form of the Shardstone Ingot as the name suggests. You can obtain this by crafting this by turning 9  Shardstone Ingots into The Block of Shardstone

v. **Killer Star Fragments**: These are found EXETREMELY Rarely in the End Towers

vi. **Diamond Infused Killer Star Fragments**: Despite the long name, they are quite simple, they are crafted with 4 Diamonds and a Killer Star Fragment. They are vital in crafting the Killer star

v. **Killer Star**: This is a very OP Star, crafted from 8 Diamond Infused Killer Star Fragments and a Shardstone Block, They are the Main Component in Crafting the Killer Form of the Shardstone Tools

vi. **Concrete Stairs & Slabs**: As the name suggests You can get Concrete Stairs And Slabs with this mod. You can obtain them with the normal crafting recipe or using the Stonecutter

2. Tools:

i. Shardstone Tools: You can craft Shardstone Swords, Pickaxes, Axes, Shovels and Hoes using the Standard Crafting recipie you would use for anyother Tool

ii. The Killer Tools: The Killer Tools are The EXETREMELY OP Shardstone Tools. To craft this, You need a Shardstone Tool of Choice, a Killer Star, a Shardstone Block and 2 Diamonds. They Have Enchanced Durability, Efficiency (For The Pickaxe, Axe And Hoe), Attack Speed & Damage (For The Sword and Axe) and Enchantability

3. Structures:

i. End Towers: They are full with Traps, Enderman and Shulkers, In they're Chests they have a chance of having Chours Fruit, Gold, Iron, Shardstone Ingots & Gem and Killer Star Fragments. Chrous Fruit, Gold and Iron are Common while Shardstone Ingots & Gems and Killer Star Fragments are EXETREMELY Rare

ii. Treehouse: They are found in the Tropical Rainforest (New Biome in this mod). They have a chance of spawning a villager with the Woodsmith Profession. The villager Trades wood for Emeralds and Vice Versa

4. Biomes:

i. Tropical Rainforest: They have tall oak trees, Coarse Dirt below the surface of Grass Blocks, Plains Villages, Jungle Temples, Treehouses and Extra Gold & Emeralds. They are a good place to get Oak logs & Coarse dirt
